39.reason: [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients in ans3. The exponents are then written to the same array starting from index 0, but the coefficients from the previous loop are lost. This leads to uninitialized or incorrect coefficient values when printing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients in ans3. The exponents are then written to the same array starting from index 0, but the coefficients from the previous loop are lost. This leads to uninitialized or incorrect coefficient values when printing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients in ans3. The exponents are then written into ans3 starting from index 0, overwriting the coefficient data and leaving the rest of the array uninitialized or mismatched. Coefficients and exponents should be stored together in the same loop iteration.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients in ans3. The exponents are then written to the same indices, but the coefficients from the previous loop are lost.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients. The exponents are then written to the same array but starting from index 0, causing coefficient and exponent data to be misaligned.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This resets x to 0, discarding the previously stored coefficients. The exponents are then written to the same array but starting from index 0, overwriting or misaligning with the coefficients. Coefficients and exponents must be stored together in the same iteration.]

58.reason: [This line incorrectly doubles ans3[w].xi instead of adding ans3[e].xi. It should be ans3[w].xi += ans3[e].xi. This causes wrong coefficient accumulation during term merging.]
